◎标　　签　美国 | 惊悚 | 2019 | 犯罪 | 烂片 | 剧情 | 美国电影 | 通俗的套路剧情，就像清水煮面条一样，寡淡无味，全程快进

◎简　　介  

　　After a group of telemarketers get fired by their penny-pinching boss, they take revenge by stealing the company's list of clients to start up their own firm. In the heat of celebration and a few drinks in, they lose the phone which holds the only copy of their future costumers. While tracking the lost device on Halloween night, co-workers Amber and Will find themselves trapped in a demented drug addict's house of horrors.
